metadata.description: Blue Skills — Claude Code marketplace for coding agents and skills.

plugins.name: investigate-project
plugins.description: Investigate an open-source codebase and produce business-feature reports (report-features skill + six sub-agents).

plugins.name: investigate-issue
plugins.description: Deep-dive analysis of a single issue in an open-source repo (investigate skill; final report to stdout only).

plugins.name: audit-code
plugins.description: Intent-driven code review via /audit-code:review (PR, local git diff, paths); seven-axis analysts + merger gate; stdout only.

plugins.name: audit
plugins.description: 对本地代码变更、在线 PR 等进行缺陷分析和质量评审，输出一份完整的缺陷和严重等级的分析报告
